tech_news.title: Apple Plans to Open Up Siri to Rival AI Assistants in iOS 27 Update - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Apple Inc. plans to open Siri to outside artificial intelligence assistants, a major move aimed at bolstering the iPhone as an AI platform.

tech_news.title: Xbox’s latest games showcase had Hades 2, The Expanse, and Bluey - The Verge
tech_news.description: At its Xbox Partner Preview livestream, Microsoft showed off a number of upcoming games, including the Xbox port of Hades 2.

tech_news.title: Project Motor Racing free-to-play on PC - Traxion.GG
tech_news.description: The promotion means that those with a PC and Steam can play Project Motor Racing for no charge from now until the 30th March.

tech_news.title: Hades 2 Coming To PS5 And Game Pass In April, Skipping PS4 - Kotaku
tech_news.description: The popular roguelike action game starring sexy gods is finally coming to more platforms, and to Game Pass

tech_news.title: My brief, weird time with the Samsung TriFold - The Verge
tech_news.description: $4000 and a ROM update later, the Galaxy Z TriFold we bought on eBay is up and running. But we’re starting to see why Samsung discontinued it abruptly.

tech_news.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Cost of Hope – First Details About the Major Heart of Chornobyl Expansion - Xbox Wire
tech_news.description: A massive new storyline, two new regions - including the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant - that can take dozens of hours to explore, and much more. All in the S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Cost of Hope expansion announced at #XboxPartnerPreview:

tech_news.title: The Expanse: Osiris Reborn – Learn More About Gameplay, New Companions, the Closed Beta, and the Release Window - Xbox Wire
tech_news.description: The release of The Expanse: Osiris Reborn is planned for spring 2027, and players can gain access to an Xbox Series X|S Closed Beta on April 22, 2026.
